overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking along a mountain forest trail toward a distant stone fortress. The scene transitions from dense pine forest to an open valley view with the castle emerging from the mist.

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the narrow forest path with two swords strapped to his back

entered.detail: dense tall pine trees lining the left side of the trail
dense tall pine trees lining the right side of the trail
tall mountain peak with snow visible in the distance beyond the trees
narrow winding dirt path through the forest with patches of grass
colorful red and yellow wildflowers growing along the path edge
short wooden stump markers along the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks through a dense pine forest along a narrow dirt trail. Tall evergreen trees flank both sides of the path while snow-capped mountains are visible in the distant background. The afternoon sun casts dappled shadows across the wildflowers lining the route.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain trail opening to valley vista

events.description: dense forest opens up to reveal a wide valley with a stone fortress castle visible in the distance
path passes wooden marker posts on the left as the view expands to show valley fog below

agents.ego_description: continuing along the widening path as the forest thins and the castle comes into view ahead

entered.detail: large medieval stone castle fortress perched on the mountainside across the valley
low clouds and mist filling the valley below the mountain trail
large gray rock formation emerging from the vegetation on the right

segments.scene_description: The forest opens up to reveal a breathtaking valley view with a stone fortress castle visible in the distance. The path continues along the mountainside with valley fog below, and wooden marker posts appear on the left. The snow-capped mountain shifts to the left of the frame as the camera advances.

events.description: path becomes rocky and uneven as approaching the castle walls
castle walls now dominate the left side with the main tower clearly visible ahead

agents.ego_description: walking toward the fortress with the castle walls now prominent on the left and the tower ahead

entered.detail: massive stone walls of the fortress with crenellations visible on the left side
tall cylindrical stone tower of the castle rising above the walls
large boulders and rocky slope on the right side of the path
low bushes and sparse grass replacing the dense forest

segments.scene_description: The final approach to the fortress features a rocky path with the massive stone walls and tower now dominating the left side of the frame. The dense forest has given way to scrub vegetation and large boulders. The castle grows larger as Geralt approaches, with the valley fog now visible in the far distance behind the structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the depths of a dense pine forest toward the imposing walls of a distant stone fortress. It begins with Geralt walking along a narrow dirt trail flanked by tall evergreens and wildflowers, with snow-capped mountains visible in the far distance under dappled afternoon sunlight. As the forest opens up, the scene expands into a breathtaking valley view where wooden marker posts line the path and the mountains shift to the left of the frame. The terrain then transitions from lush woods to a rocky mountainside with scrub vegetation and large boulders, while the valley fog settles far below. Finally, the camera advances until the massive stone walls and towers of the fortress dominate the landscape, growing larger as the path leads directly toward the structure.
